zh.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick是Hugh de Morewick和Sibella De Umfreville的兒子，於大約1224年出生在英國諾圖波藍德莫維其可。他於1248年與Agnes de Heyford在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1269年4月26日在英國諾圖波藍德韋斯特 設分頓享年46歲，埋葬在英國越可爾吉斯波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick是Hugh de Morewick和Sibella De Umfreville的儿子，于大约1224年出生在英国諾圖波藍德莫維其可。他于1248年与Agnes de Heyford在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1269年4月26日在英国諾圖波藍德韋斯特 設分頓享年46岁，埋葬在英国越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick was born about 1224, in Morwick, Northumberland, England as the son of Hugh de Morewick and Sibella De Umfreville. He married Agnes de Heyford in 1248, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 26 April 1269, in West Chevington, Northumberland, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick est né environ 1224, à Morwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, fils de Hugh de Morewick et Sibella De Umfreville. Il a épousé Agnes de Heyford en 1248, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 avril 1269, à West Chevington, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick wurde um 1224 in Morwick, Northumberland, England, als Sohn von Hugh de Morewick und Sibella De Umfreville geboren. Er hat 1248 in Warkworth, Northumberland, England Agnes de Heyford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. April 1269 im Alter von 46 Jahren in West Chevington, Northumberland, England und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick è nato il circa 1224 nel Morwick, Northumberland, England come figlio di Hugh de Morewick e Sibella De Umfreville. Lui sposato Agnes de Heyford nel 1248, nel Warkworth, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 aprile 1269, nel West Chevington, Northumberland, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewickは約1224年にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーウィックでHugh de MorewickとSibella De Umfrevilleの息子として生まれた。1248年にイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスでAgnes de Heyfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1269年4月26日にイギリスノースウンバーランドウエスト チェヴィントンで46歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick(은)는 대략 1224년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모윅에서 Hugh de Morewick(와)과 Sibella De Umfreville의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1248년 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 Agnes de Heyford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1269년 4월 26일 영국 노르스벌랜드 웨스트 처빙턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 길스버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick nasceu aproximadamente 1224, em Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra filho de Hugh de Morewick e Sibella De Umfreville. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Heyford em 1248, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de abril de 1269, em West Chevington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick родился около 1224 г. в местности морвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. Его родителей звали Hugh de Morewick и Sibella De Umfreville. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Heyford в 1248 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 апреля 1269 г. в местности вест чевингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Hugh de Morewick nació aproximadamente 1224, en Morwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra como hijo de Hugh de Morewick y Sibella De Umfreville. Se casó con Agnes de Heyford en 1248, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de abril de 1269, en West Chevington, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Guisborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
